game_info.title: Gravity Circuit: Neon Pulse
game_info.concept:
Gravity Circuit is a flashy action packed 2D platformer in the spirit of console classics. Follow Kai, a lone operative war hero who harnesses the mysterious powers of the Gravity Circuit, on an adventure in a futuristic world inhabited by sentient robots. Steam URL: https://store.steampowered.com/app/858710/Gravity_Circuit/ ================================================================================ Full Description: ================================================================================ Gravity Circuit is a flashy action packed 2D platformer in the spirit of console classics. Follow Kai, a lone operative war hero who harnesses the mysterious powers of the Gravity Circuit, on an adventure in a futuristic world inhabited by sentient robots. Gravity Circuit - a flashy action packed 2d platformer in the spirit of console classics.



Mission: Stop the Virus Army’s Uprising!
In a futuristic world populated by sentient robots, its inhabitants are once more threatened by an old foe, the Virus Army. Defeated decades ago, it has re-emerged from the shadows with a unique goal, complete world domination. Severely weakened Guardian Corps are left with no other choice but to call upon a hero of the previous war: the lone operative, Kai, who harnesses the powers of the mysterious Gravity Circuit. As the world's last line of defense, journey through futuristic environments, and take down the evil mastermind behind this chaos.

Reminiscent of classic platformers from the 80s and 90s, with action dialed to maximum, channel your power into your fists and send foes flying, or grapple them to get up close and personal. In your quest you will acquire many new powers, which will allow you to go even further beyond!



  • Action packed platforming
    By channeling your energy into devastating punches, perform satisfying combos and send foes flying, causing destruction and mayhem in the process!
  • Save the innocent, and power up!
    Stages are packed with secrets and innocent civilians alike. Uncover and rescue them, and unlock new powers!
  • Single player campaign with 12 stages
    Each with their unique set of mechanics, your platforming and combat skills will be tested against an armada of enemies and bosses!



    Gravity Circuit is in active development by a small and dedicated core team. You can follow the game's development via Twitter.
game_info.description: Gravity Circuit: Neon Pulse is a high-octane 2D action platformer. You play as Kai, a legendary war hero equipped with the Gravity Circuit. Your mission is to traverse the neon-lit sectors of a futuristic city, defeat the Virus Army robots using your gravity-infused punches and grappling hook, and shut down the rogue AI core. Use your agility to navigate complex hazards and your combat skills to crush robotic foes.
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Left/Right: Move character
- Arrow Up: Aim Grapple Up / Interact
- Arrow Down: Crouch / Drop through platforms
- Space: Jump (Hold for higher jump)
- Z: Attack (Punch / Combo)
- Shift: Grapple Hook (Latch onto ceilings or enemies)
- Enter: Start Game
- Esc: Pause Game
- R: Restart (from Game Over)

TEST_1.test_description: Test the basic physics engine stability and player survival capabilities under random input conditions.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The automated controller will generate random movement and jump inputs (Left, Right, Space) to stress-test the collision detection and gravity systems. The goal is to ensure the player doesn't fall through the floor or get stuck in walls.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player entity should remain within the bounds of the level geometry and correctly interact with platforms. The test is considered successful if the player is still "alive" (y < death_plane) after 10 seconds of chaotic movement.

TEST_2.test_description: Test the level completion capability and AI navigation logic.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The controller will use a heuristic-based AI to navigate the level. It will prioritize moving right, jumping when obstacles are detected via raycasting, and attacking when enemies are in close proximity.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The player should successfully traverse the terrain, defeat or avoid enemies, and reach the x-coordinate of the level end goal (Victory Condition) without depleting all health.
